thinking.text: The user seems satisfied with the information and says they've applied for the EcoCard. They're thanking me and wrapping up the conversation. I'll respond positively and let them know I'm here if they need anything else.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome! I'm glad the EcoCard fits your needs so well. 🎉

Here's a quick recap of what you'll have access to once you're approved:

- 🌍 **1.0% foreign transaction fee** — perfect for those crypto conferences abroad
- 💳 **Virtual card management** — create, lock, or delete virtual numbers for secure online purchases
- 📉 **Minimum payment of just 1.0%** — flexible for managing your cash flow
- 🌱 **Sustainability rewards** — earn points on all your spending

Once your application is processed and you receive your card, don't forget to activate it, set up your virtual cards, and you'll be good to go!

If you ever need any help down the road — whether it's managing your account, setting up payments, or anything else — don't hesitate to reach out. Best of luck with your crypto trading and travels! 🚀
